ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ataraxy-Labs/sem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ataraxy-Labs/sem
Language: rust
Semantic version control CLI. Entity-level diff, blame, graph, and impact analysis for code. 23 languages via tree-sitter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaif-goose/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose
Language: rust
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: biomejs/biome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/biomejs/biome
Language: rust
A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dandavison/delta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dandavison/delta
Language: rust
A syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, grep, rg --json, and blame output

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim
Language: rust
The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mayocream/koharu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mayocream/koharu
Language: rust
ML-powered manga translator, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memvid/memvid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: njbrake/agent-of-empires
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/njbrake/agent-of-empires
Language: rust
Manage your Claude Code, OpenCode agents from either TUI or Web for easy access on mobile. Also supports Mistral Vibe, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi.dev, Copilot CLI, Factory Droid Coding. Uses tmux and git worktrees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pola-rs/polars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pola-rs/polars
Language: rust
Extremely fast Query Engine for DataFrames, written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qufei1993/skills-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qufei1993/skills-hub
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop app to manage Agent Skills in one place and sync them to multiple AI coding tools’ global skills directories — “Install once, sync everywhere”.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rivet-dev/agent-os
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rivet-dev/agent-os
Language: rust
A portable open-source operating system for agents. ~6 ms coldstarts, 32x cheaper than sandboxes. Powered by WebAssembly and V8 isolates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rust-lang/rust
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust
Language: rust
Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailcallhq/forgecode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailcallhq/forgecode
Language: rust
AI enabled pair programmer for Claude, GPT, O Series, Grok, Deepseek, Gemini and 300+ models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter
Language: rust
An incremental parsing system for programming tools

ns0:entry.ns0:title: uutils/coreutils
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/uutils/coreutils
Language: rust
Cross-platform Rust rewrite of the GNU coreutils
